title: Junior Business Development Manager at Amrapali Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Amrapali Group
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
